## Enumerations

<a id="enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode"></a>

enum **WriteMode**: [🔗](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode)

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-write-mode-text"></a>

[WriteMode](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode) **WRITE_MODE_TEXT** = `0`

Tells the channel to send data over this channel as text. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as a string.

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-write-mode-binary"></a>

[WriteMode](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode) **WRITE_MODE_BINARY** = `1`

Tells the channel to send data over this channel as binary. An external peer (non-Godot) would receive this as array buffer or blob.

---

<a id="enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate"></a>

enum **ChannelState**: [🔗](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate)

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-state-connecting"></a>

[ChannelState](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate) **STATE_CONNECTING** = `0`

The channel was created, but it's still trying to connect.

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-state-open"></a>

[ChannelState](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate) **STATE_OPEN** = `1`

The channel is currently open, and data can flow over it.

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-state-closing"></a>

[ChannelState](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate) **STATE_CLOSING** = `2`

The channel is being closed, no new messages will be accepted, but those already in queue will be flushed.

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-constant-state-closed"></a>

[ChannelState](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate) **STATE_CLOSED** = `3`

The channel was closed, or connection failed.

---

## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-property-write-mode"></a>

[WriteMode](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode) **write_mode** = `1` [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-property-write-mode)

-  **set_write_mode**(value: [WriteMode](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode))
- [WriteMode](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-writemode) **get_write_mode**()

The transfer mode to use when sending outgoing packet. Either text or binary.

---

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-close"></a>

 **close**() [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-close)

Closes this data channel, notifying the other peer.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-buffered-amount"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_buffered_amount**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-buffered-amount)

Returns the number of bytes currently queued to be sent over this channel.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-id"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_id**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-id)

Returns the ID assigned to this channel during creation (or auto-assigned during negotiation).

If the channel is not negotiated out-of-band the ID will only be available after the connection is established (will return `65535` until then).

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-label"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_label**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-label)

Returns the label assigned to this channel during creation.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-max-packet-life-time"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_max_packet_life_time**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-max-packet-life-time)

Returns the `maxPacketLifeTime` value assigned to this channel during creation.

Will be `65535` if not specified.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-max-retransmits"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_max_retransmits**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-max-retransmits)

Returns the `maxRetransmits` value assigned to this channel during creation.

Will be `65535` if not specified.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-protocol"></a>

[String](class_string.md#class-string) **get_protocol**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-protocol)

Returns the sub-protocol assigned to this channel during creation. An empty string if not specified.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-ready-state"></a>

[ChannelState](#enum-webrtcdatachannel-channelstate) **get_ready_state**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-get-ready-state)

Returns the current state of this channel.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-is-negotiated"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_negotiated**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-is-negotiated)

Returns `true` if this channel was created with out-of-band configuration.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-is-ordered"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_ordered**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-is-ordered)

Returns `true` if this channel was created with ordering enabled (default).

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-poll"></a>

[Error](class_@globalscope.md#enum-globalscope-error) **poll**() [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-poll)

Reserved, but not used for now.

---

<a id="class-webrtcdatachannel-method-was-string-packet"></a>

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **was_string_packet**()  [🔗](#class-webrtcdatachannel-method-was-string-packet)

Returns `true` if the last received packet was transferred as text. See [write_mode](#class-webrtcdatachannel-property-write-mode).
